hooks.command: urls=$(jq -r '.tool_input.value // ""' | grep -oP 'https?://www\.youtube\.com/[^\s]*list=[A-Za-z0-9_-]+' | head -5); if [ -n "$urls" ]; then echo "$urls" | while IFS= read -r url; do cd 'C:/Users/aakas/OneDrive/Desktop/memory/claude_memory/code' && uv run python fetch_playlist.py "$url"; done; fi
